# Issue: Adjust Navigation Button Width on Login Page

**Description:**
The navigation buttons on the login page need their width adjusted for better usability and visual consistency.

**Suggested Solution:**
- Review the current button width styling in the login page components.
- Update the CSS/styled-components to ensure buttons have an appropriate and consistent width.
- Test across different screen sizes for responsiveness.

**Files to Check:**
- `src/auth/pages/Login/index.jsx`
- `src/auth/pages/Login/index.styled.js`

**Priority:**
Medium
